name: intermedia-exchange-connector
description: Read Intermedia Hosted Exchange customer-service mail and save reply drafts without sending.

interface.shortDescription: Draft safe customer-service replies in Intermedia Exchange.
interface.longDescription: Connects to a private Intermedia Hosted Exchange mailbox through EWS, lists recent customer messages, reads message content, and saves reply drafts without sending email.
defaultPrompt: Check customer-service mail and prepare safe drafts.
Show unread customer inquiries needing replies.
Draft a warm reply without sending it.
